name: Di Luigi 2008 Tadalafil VO2max Athletes Extract
population_or_context: Healthy male athletes exercising in normoxia.
methods: Double-blind crossover maximal cycle ergometer testing after tadalafil 20 mg or placebo.
population_profile: Healthy trained male athletes; relevant to healthy men but younger/trained and small sample.
tadalafil_exposure: Single therapeutic tadalafil 20 mg dose before maximal cycle exercise in normoxia.
indication_context: Experimental healthy-athlete performance physiology; not ED/BPH/PAH treatment.
study_design: Double-blind placebo-controlled crossover trial with maximal cycle ergometry.
safety_findings: Systolic blood pressure was lower before and after exercise; no detailed adverse-event extraction in abstract.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for acute normoxic exercise performance in healthy men, low for chronic daily use, untrained users, resistance training, altitude, or long-term adaptation.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Small trained-athlete sample, acute dosing, normoxia only, surrogate exercise test endpoints, and abstract-level extraction.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but only acute 20 mg normoxic athlete testing; it does not address sildenafil-like altitude effects or chronic daily tadalafil.
